targets.label: Fig. 1 Floquet spectrum omega(k,beta) and initial populations rho_{n,k}(0), J=K=3

feature_match.reason: Three gapped Floquet surfaces over the (k,beta) torus reproduce panel (a) (blue/yellow/red band ordering, undulation, omega/pi in [-0.95,0.95]). Panel (b): all three population curves reproduce the paper shapes color-for-color (edge-peaked, double-humped at k~+-0.15, center-peaked), symmetric in k, summing to 1.

numeric_closeness.reason: omega/pi band ranges [-0.95,-0.56], [-0.28,0.28], [0.56,0.95] match Fig. 1(a) axis extent; rho sums to 1 to 1e-10; peak/dip locations of rho match the raster panel to plotting resolution. No author data to compare pointwise.

paper_scope_coverage.reason: Both panels at the paper parameters J=K=3, alpha=1/3, tau=2, site-0 initial state.

targets.remaining_gap: Paper is raster-only (no author data / tables); comparison is structural + feature-level against the printed figure. Band-to-colour mapping differs between the paper's panels (a) and (b); we follow each panel's own mapping.

targets.label: Fig. 2 population change Delta rho_{n,k} after one cycle: actual dynamics vs Eq. (8) theory, J=K=3, T=1024

feature_match.reason: Both actual (exact dynamics) and theory (Eq. 8) reproduce the paper's rapid k-oscillation with a small-at-center, large-at-edge envelope reaching ~+-5e-3, symmetric in k, on all three bands (2x3 layout). Theory tracks actual: correlation 0.83/0.91/0.90 per band.

numeric_closeness.reason: Amplitude envelope ~+-4-5e-3 matches the paper y-axis (Delta rho/1e-3); sum_n Delta rho = 0 to 1e-9. Pointwise theory-vs-actual RMS ~1e-3 (signal ~5e-3); residual is the inherent Omega~10^2 rad phase sensitivity at T=1024, which also limits the paper's own panel-to-panel match.

paper_scope_coverage.reason: Paper parameters J=K=3, T=1024; all three bands shown. Bottom-band emphasis of the text is included.

targets.remaining_gap: The W(1) phase term carries an accumulated dynamical phase of hundreds of radians at T=1024, making pointwise Delta rho extremely phase-sensitive; theory reproduces the structure at correlation ~0.9, not to pixel. This sensitivity is intrinsic to Eq. (8), not a modelling gap.

targets.label: Fig. 3 wave-packet displacement <x>(t) over one cycle for six T; Eq. (13) total vs Berry-only, J=K=4

feature_match.reason: Six staircase <x>(t) curves rise from 0 and end at ~3.1 for all six durations T=1024..6144 (T-independent displacement), reproducing the fan-out and the two horizontal reference lines. Theory total (Eq. 13) sits at the endpoints; the Berry-only term sits well above -- exactly the paper's demonstration that the IBC correction is essential.

numeric_closeness.reason: Actual endpoints mean 3.117, std 0.021 across the six T (T-independent to <1%); theory total 3.084 (paper dashed ~3.1); Berry-only 4.325 (paper triangles ~4.3); IBC correction -1.24. Theory total agrees with the exact dynamics to ~2%.

paper_scope_coverage.reason: All six paper durations at paper parameters J=K=4, alpha=1/3, tau=2, exact one-cycle piecewise-constant beta protocol.

targets.remaining_gap: Compared visually and by readable feature values (endpoints, Berry-only line) against the raster figure; the paper reports no author data. Actual endpoint is the exact <x> = sum_l l|<l|Psi>|^2, stronger than the paper's leading-order Eq. (A19) approximation.

targets.label: Fig. 4 Delta<x> vs J across the Floquet-Chern topological transition; actual vs Eq. (13) vs Berry-only, T=2560

feature_match.reason: Delta<x> vs J reproduces the paper's rise to a peak near J~5.12, discontinuous jump at the Chern transition, and post-transition decay, for actual, theory total, and Berry-only. Actual tracks theory except in a small window near J~5.15 where it becomes erratic -- exactly the paper's observation. Chern jump (4,-8,4)->(-8,16,-8) (up to overall sign) confirmed.

numeric_closeness.reason: Transition at J=5.14 (paper ~5.14); theory peak 19.5 (paper ~19-20); Berry-only peak 11.1 (paper ~11); post-transition theory 15.7->11.3 and Berry-only 7.5->5.9 match the paper decay. Theory is 4.3x closer to the actual dynamics than the Berry-only term (mean |diff| 1.12 vs 4.81).

paper_scope_coverage.reason: Full scan J=K in [5.0,5.3] at the paper duration T=2560, 61 points.

targets.remaining_gap: Actual peak ~17.4 vs paper ~19 near the transition, where the dynamics is genuinely T-sensitive (bands nearly touch, W(0)~1/(1-e^{i.dw}) grows); the paper notes the same erratic/T-sensitive behaviour there. Comparison is feature-level against the raster figure.

panels.note: Delta<x> vs J: actual, theory, Berry-only across transition
